---
title: "ENVS 193DS — Homework 3"
author: "Will Grimsich"
format: pdf
date: 5-27-2026
execute:
  warning: FALSE
  message: FALSE
---
# Set Up
```{r Reading in data and packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(readxl)

kelp <- read.csv(here("data","temp-kelp.csv"))
```
